facade-lighting.title: Facade Lighting
facade-lighting.shortDescription: Aesthetics and energy efficiency with custom LED lighting solutions for modern building facades.
facade-lighting.fullDescription: Our facade lighting solutions transform buildings into architectural masterpieces after dark. We combine aesthetics with energy efficiency using state-of-the-art LED technology. Whether it's a corporate headquarters, hotel, or residential complex, our custom designs highlight the unique architectural features of any structure.

faq.question: How long does installation take?
faq.answer: Installation typically takes 2-4 weeks depending on building size and complexity.

faq.question: What is the lifespan of LED systems?
faq.answer: Our LED systems last 50,000+ hours (approx. 10-15 years with normal use).

industrial-lighting.title: Industrial Lighting
industrial-lighting.shortDescription: Professional lighting systems for factories, warehouses and industrial facilities.
industrial-lighting.fullDescription: Industrial environments demand robust, high-performance lighting solutions. Our industrial lighting systems are designed to withstand harsh conditions while providing optimal illumination for safety and productivity. From high-bay LED fixtures to explosion-proof lighting, we have solutions for every industrial application.

faq.question: Are these suitable for cold storage?
faq.answer: Yes, our fixtures operate efficiently down to -40°C.

landscape-lighting.title: Landscape Lighting
landscape-lighting.shortDescription: Environmentally friendly LED lighting solutions for gardens, parks and open areas.
landscape-lighting.fullDescription: Create stunning outdoor environments with our landscape lighting solutions. We specialize in environmentally friendly LED systems that enhance natural beauty while minimizing light pollution. Perfect for parks, gardens, pathways, and architectural landscaping features.

faq.question: Are these safe for wet areas?
faq.answer: Yes, we provide IP67 and IP68 rated fixtures for fountains and water features.

road-lighting.title: Road Lighting
road-lighting.shortDescription: Safe and economical lighting systems for urban and intercity roads.
road-lighting.fullDescription: Ensure safe roadways with our professional road lighting solutions. Our systems meet international standards for illumination levels while reducing energy consumption. We provide complete solutions for highways, urban streets, tunnels, and pedestrian crossings.

faq.question: How is maintenance handled?
faq.answer: We offer remote monitoring and scheduled maintenance contracts.

energy-solutions.title: Energy Solutions
energy-solutions.shortDescription: Lighting systems integrated with renewable energy sources.
energy-solutions.fullDescription: Reduce your carbon footprint with our renewable energy integrated lighting solutions. We combine solar, wind, and energy storage technologies with efficient LED lighting to create truly sustainable systems. Perfect for off-grid applications and organizations committed to net-zero goals.

faq.question: What happens on cloudy days?
faq.answer: Battery storage provides 3-5 days of backup power.

smart-systems.title: Smart Systems
smart-systems.shortDescription: IoT-based smart lighting control and management systems.
smart-systems.fullDescription: Transform your lighting into an intelligent network with our IoT-based smart systems. Real-time monitoring, predictive maintenance, and automated control reduce operational costs while maximizing efficiency. Integrate with existing BMS, HVAC, and security systems for complete building automation.

faq.question: Is this compatible with existing systems?
faq.answer: Yes, our open API integrates with major BMS platforms.

bms.title: BMS (Building Management System)
bms.shortDescription: Centralized control systems for HVAC, lighting, security and energy management.
bms.fullDescription: Building Management Systems (BMS) are intelligent control systems that monitor and control a building's mechanical and electrical equipment. Our BMS solutions integrate HVAC, lighting, power systems, fire alarms, and security systems into a single, user-friendly platform. This centralization enables facility managers to optimize energy consumption, reduce operational costs, and ensure occupant comfort. With real-time monitoring and automated control, our BMS can reduce energy bills by up to 30% while extending equipment life through predictive maintenance.

faq.question: What is the ROI period for a BMS?
faq.answer: Typically 2-5 years depending on building size and energy consumption patterns.

faq.question: Can BMS integrate with existing systems?
faq.answer: Yes, our BMS supports multiple protocols for seamless integration with existing equipment.

ddc.title: DDC Control Devices
ddc.shortDescription: Direct digital control systems for sensor and actuator management.
ddc.fullDescription: Direct Digital Control (DDC) is the brain of modern building automation. Our DDC controllers process data from sensors and send precise commands to actuators, valves, and dampers. Unlike older pneumatic or analog systems, DDC provides exact control, data logging, and remote accessibility. Our programmable controllers are field-adjustable and can be customized for any HVAC, lighting, or industrial process application. With built-in PID loops and scheduling capabilities, DDC ensures optimal performance while minimizing energy waste.
benefits: Scalable from single zone to entire building

faq.question: What is the lifespan of DDC controllers?
faq.answer: Our DDC controllers typically last 10-15 years with proper maintenance.

mechanical-drive.title: Mechanical Drive Systems (Shaft/Mill)
mechanical-drive.shortDescription: Shaft and drive systems manufacturing and assembly for rotational motion transmission.
mechanical-drive.fullDescription: Mechanical drive systems are the backbone of industrial power transmission. We specialize in the design, manufacturing, and assembly of precision shafts, couplings, and drive components. Our systems transmit rotational power from motors to driven equipment such as pumps, fans, conveyors, and mills. Using high-grade materials and precision balancing, we ensure smooth operation with minimal vibration and energy loss. Each system is custom-engineered for specific torque, speed, and environmental requirements, ensuring maximum reliability and service life.

faq.question: What materials do you use for shafts?
faq.answer: We use EN8, EN24, EN19, stainless steel, and special alloys based on application requirements.

prover.title: Prover / Test Devices
prover.shortDescription: Flow meter and sensor verification, calibration and test systems.
prover.fullDescription: Prover systems are critical for ensuring measurement accuracy in fluid handling applications. Our prover and test devices provide precise calibration and verification of flow meters, sensors, and measurement instruments. Using master meter and volumetric prover technologies, we help customers maintain ISO compliance and measurement integrity. Regular proving ensures that custody transfer measurements are accurate, reducing financial losses from measurement errors. Our portable and fixed prover systems serve oil & gas, water treatment, chemical, and pharmaceutical industries.

faq.question: How often should meters be proved?
faq.answer: Typically monthly or quarterly, depending on regulatory requirements and application criticality.

mechanical-installation.title: Mechanical Installation Assembly
mechanical-installation.shortDescription: Pump, valve, pipe and mechanical equipment installation services.
mechanical-installation.fullDescription: Professional mechanical installation is essential for system reliability and longevity. Our certified team provides complete mechanical installation services including pumps, valves, piping systems, HVAC equipment, and industrial machinery. We follow strict quality procedures, pressure testing standards, and safety protocols. From foundation preparation to final alignment and commissioning, we ensure every component is installed to manufacturer specifications and industry best practices. Our installation services cover both new construction and retrofit projects across all industrial sectors.

faq.question: Do you provide warranty on installations?
faq.answer: Yes, we offer a 12-month warranty on all mechanical installation work.

common.contactForQuote: Contact us for a free consultation and quote
